nasb.text: Thus you will say to that prophet, ‘What has the Lord answered you?’ and, ‘What has the Lord spoken?’

esv.text: Thus you shall say to the prophet, ‘What has the Lord answered you?’ or ‘What has the Lord spoken?’

cnv.text: 你們要對　神的先知說：“耶和華回答了你甚麼？耶和華說了甚麼呢？”

ccb.text: 耶利米啊，你要这样问先知，‘耶和华有什么答复？耶和华说了什么？’
